description: Grouped, scheduled dependency updates gated by the Tests workflow. Dependabot was removed after ungated bumps broke the cron jobs and avatar baker; every Renovate PR now has to pass vitest + e2e before it can merge.

schedule: before 8am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: Group all non-major updates into one weekly PR — one CI run, one review.
Majors stay individual PRs — they need real review, not a rubber stamp.
Solana/web3 + pump.fun SDKs move APIs aggressively and touch money paths; never auto-group, always wait longer.
three.js minor releases routinely break examples/jsm imports — treat like majors.
